text.message: Wasn't paying attention. Thought I was fourth. Terrible pick.
Ruined my own game from the off lol
Was gonna take the 8-5-10 and have some fun on a brick port wheatless game
Please forgive me if I tune out from this game as a result
I will keep it quick, though
It does mean if anyone robs me early, my whole game will be vengeance fun
That said, I'm doing a cryptic crossword, so I might not notice
I'll hold you to that blue
Proper clown show stuff from me
He used it on the city
"It's just a little airborne... It's still good..."
Now just need that sexy 2 to hit again and again
bro what are you talking about
are you even following the game guys?
Indeed. No fours or fives means no wheat
black is leading by a lot
Dunno. I make me a strong favourite
we're gonna get destroyed by those ports
I traded it to you lmao
Docrain gave Grain and got Wool from Suchmo
literally offered grain for ? and took your trade
I honestly must have missed it
Calculating whether he can take road?
I can't believe the game that I messed up at from the start ran long lol
